_description: Reusable PPT design presets for common presentation scenarios. Use these as starting points for style_guidelines.

pitch-deck.description: Startup pitch deck with bold visuals and clear narrative

style_guidelines.color_palette: Bold gradient: #7C3AED → #EC4899 → #F97316, white text on dark, accent #06B6D4
style_guidelines.typography: Satoshi or Inter, 72pt+ bold headlines, 20pt body, -0.02em letter-spacing on titles
style_guidelines.imagery: Abstract 3D shapes, product screenshots on device mockups, team photos with consistent treatment
style_guidelines.layout: Full-bleed backgrounds, centered content blocks, generous 48px padding, one stat per slide

quarterly-report.description: Professional quarterly business review with data focus

style_guidelines.color_palette: Corporate blue #1B4F72 primary, #2E86C1 secondary, #E8F4FD background accents, #333333 text
style_guidelines.typography: Helvetica Neue or SF Pro, 48pt bold headlines, 18pt body, strict baseline grid
style_guidelines.imagery: Clean data visualizations, minimal icons, no decorative elements, charts embedded as images
style_guidelines.layout: 12-column grid, left-aligned text, charts right-aligned or full-width, 60% negative space

product-launch.description: Product launch keynote with cinematic impact

style_guidelines.color_palette: Deep black #000000 base, pure white text, signature accent blue #0071E3 or product brand color
style_guidelines.typography: SF Pro Display, 80pt+ dramatic headlines, 24pt light body, extreme weight contrast
style_guidelines.imagery: Cinematic product shots, shallow DOF, dramatic rim lighting, full-bleed hero images
style_guidelines.layout: Maximum negative space 60%+, single focal point, centered or dramatically offset, no clutter

training-workshop.description: Educational training with clear structure and engagement

style_guidelines.color_palette: Friendly: muted purple #8B5CF6, teal #14B8A6, coral #FB7185, cream background #FAFAFA
style_guidelines.typography: Circular or Gilroy, 48pt medium headlines, 20pt body, comfortable line-height 1.5
style_guidelines.imagery: Clean isometric illustrations, step-by-step diagrams, numbered callouts, friendly icons
style_guidelines.layout: Central content with breathing room, numbered sections, progress indicators, 64px margins

style_guidelines.typography: Playfair Display serif headlines, Söhne sans-serif body, 96pt headlines, 16pt body, line-height 1.6
style_guidelines.imagery: Magazine-quality photography, dramatic crops, full-bleed images, editorial lighting
style_guidelines.layout: 12-column grid, intentional asymmetry, pull quotes as design elements, elegant margins
